name: SKY130 Programmable Gain Amplifier
description: Digitally-programmable gain amplifier (1x to 128x) for biosignal conditioning

gain_error_pct.description: Gain error at each setting (measured vs ideal ratio)

output_noise_uvrms.description: Output-referred noise in 0.5-150 Hz at gain=1

thd_pct.description: Total harmonic distortion at 10 Hz, 1 Vpp output

settling_time_us.description: Time to settle within 0.1% after gain change
